title: Auto Droppers
description: Specify which droppers/dispensers/crafters will automatically drop/dispense/craft items.
body:
No more linking droppers/dispensers with laggy comparators. Now all you have to do is slap an item frame with a redstone torch on its side and this mod will take care of the rest. You can stack them like a tower or use them as hopper replacements or simple hopper ducts.

Currently works on dispensers, droppers, and crafters.

Feedback is very welcome. Dm me on Discord (pepsied)

Check out [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)

![Usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UM8OT6ze/images/fd6cbaee18fe39764a95ceb704ee5b5440ed9d38.png)

As of version 1.0.1, Auto Droppers now supports crafters! Whenever a crafter has all available slots filled (accounting for disabled slots), the crafter will dispense.

![Works with crafters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UM8OT6ze/images/26004b5db7e6bc6c44a5ab8670238d991a91a979.png)

Comparators on crafters will not dispense unless all enabled slots in the crafter have more than one item. Perfect for preserving recipes!

![Crafters and Comparators](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UM8OT6ze/images/c396480517474f6a0b73855eea3989d3180ee429.png)
